heading: Departments of Library
label: 132 Departments of Library
text: The Library of Congress shall be arranged in two departments, a general library and a law library.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 81 derived from , .act July 14, 1832, ch. 221, § 14 Stat. 579
amendments: CodificationR.S. § 81 derived from , .act July 14, 1832, ch. 221, § 14 Stat. 579
